notes: Prices scraped from studio websites. 'verified: true' means prices were found on the website. 'verified: false' means prices could not be confirmed online.

yoga7-geneve.notes: Website did not expose pricing on accessible pages. Pricing pages returned 404.

innercityoga.notes: Website connection refused (ECONNREFUSED). Studio may have changed domain or be temporarily offline.

yoga-flame-geneve.notes: Pricing loaded via Bsport dynamic widget, not accessible from static HTML scraping.

yoga-lab-geneve.notes: Single 60min CHF 30, 75-90min CHF 35. Cash/TWINT only. Student/unemployed discounts available. Private CHF 130/h. Monthly unlimited CHF 195, trimester CHF 550.

fancy-yoga-geneve.notes: Wix-based website, pricing not extractable from static HTML.

sakura-yoga-geneve.trial_note: First class CHF 30, second class free
sakura-yoga-geneve.notes: 8-class card valid 9 weeks. Monthly unlimited studio+online CHF 180. Private 60min CHF 130 in-person, CHF 60 online. 10%/15% off for 5/10 private packs.

colife-geneve.notes: Trial offer: 3 cours d'essai 45 CHF found in page title. Full pricing loaded dynamically, not extractable.

sol-studio-geneve.trial_note: Trial Sol Yoga CHF 20, expires 14 days after purchase
sol-studio-geneve.notes: Drop-in CHF 35 (1 month validity). Sol Immersive drop-in CHF 40. 10-class pack valid 6 months. Unlimited yoga+reformer CHF 440/month.

swiss-pilates-yoga-geneve.notes: 12-class card (3 months) CHF 360 = CHF 30/class. Monthly 1x/week CHF 140 = CHF 32.50/class. Unlimited CHF 299, student/senior CHF 220.

akta-yoga-geneve.notes: Trial class CHF 22 (new customers only). 10-class card CHF 328. Monthly unlimited CHF 245. Annual unlimited CHF 2000.

yoga-shambala-carouge.notes: 5-class card CHF 100 (valid 6 months, CHF 20/class). Monthly CHF 100 for 6 classes. Student/AVS/AI CHF 90 for 6 classes. Payment in advance.

deva-yoga-carouge.notes: Divi WordPress site, pricing loaded dynamically. Not extractable from static HTML.

yoginimage-lancy.notes: Trial class CHF 20 (60/75min), CHF 30 (120min). 10-class card and annual subscriptions mentioned but prices not listed. Contact studio for full pricing.

ka-studio-geneve.notes: Annual membership CHF 5400/year (12-month commitment). Individual class and pass pricing loaded via Bsport widget, not extractable.

ar-yoga-geneve.notes: Divi WordPress site, /tarifs returned 404. Pricing not found.

yoga-geneve-studio.trial_note: 3 discovery classes CHF 50 (new members, valid 21 days)
yoga-geneve-studio.notes: Drop-in CHF 35. 10-class Pass Evolution CHF 270 (valid 120 days). 20-class Pass Serenite CHF 490 (valid 365 days). Discovery 3 classes CHF 50.

yoga-sha-geneve.notes: Divi WordPress site, pricing not extractable. /tarifs returned 404.

la-perle-de-letre.notes: Wix-based website, pricing not extractable from static HTML.
